summary: Iteration 6 Tasks module UI restructure (purple design) — frontend-only regression via test@example.com on mobile viewport 390x844. ALL 9 flows in the request passed with exact-string spec matches. NO bugs found. Note: shared account was NOT the promised clean 6-card state — it contained 27 pending cards (26 after one delete) with many duplicates (multiple 户外/独处/辅食/绘本 copies), evidence that prior iterations mutated it and/or the demo-seeding ran multiple times. Since the request said 'test actions will mutate it; that's fine' this is acceptable, and every spec assertion still passed against the mutated data. Backend skipped per request (unchanged since iter5, 14/14 passing).
action_items: OPTIONAL: main agent may re-seed test@example.com back to the clean 6-card baseline (drop tasks where user_id=test@example.com's id, then re-hit demo-seed) if the human wants to see the exact 6 spec cards during a manual demo. Not blocking — every flow verified against duplicated data equally well.

OPTIONAL cosmetic: the pending-count copy reads '您有27项任务待办' when there are 20 overdue and 7 on-time cards. Consider showing overdue separately (e.g. '您有N项任务待办，M项已过期') so users understand the breakdown. Not a bug; UI-polish.
critical_code_review_comments: tasks.tsx checkin flow: `checkin(t)` calls API BEFORE opening the sheet — meaning if the user taps 立刻打卡 then closes the app (or hits 跳过), the checkin is ALREADY persisted server-side. `跳过` only skips the FEELING rating, not the checkin itself. This is per-spec (sheet is a mood-log) but worth documenting so future reviewers don't file it as a bug.

TaskCard shows a full-purple progress bar for one-time tasks that are already `completed_at` (progressRatio returns 1) but the card only reaches the completed-section via the archive animation timing (380 ms). During that 380 ms the card is still in the pending list with fill=100%. Cosmetically fine; user perceives it as visual confirmation.

27 duplicate task cards on a supposedly-clean account suggests the demo-seed idempotency flag (`demo_tasks_seeded`) may not be reset when the main agent re-seeds. If the reset relies on deleting the flag+tasks then re-hitting /api/tasks, and only some of those steps happen, duplicates will multiply. Iter5 test class already covered idempotency for a single new user — consider adding a regression that re-seeding an EXISTING user with the flag cleared does NOT produce duplicates.
FILTER_TYPES in taskMeta.ts correctly excludes selfcare (matches IA — selfcare only appears under 全部). No bug.
seed_data_creation: No new test users created. Reused test@example.com. Test actions mutated it: 1 recurring task checkin (户外 5/7 → 7/7 completed), 1 one-time task completed (独处 → 已完成), 1 delete (unnamed card), 1 backfill (户外 overdue → completed). Total completed section grew from 2 → 9 cards during test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tasks UI restructure fully verified. All testIDs listed in the request (tasks-back-btn, tasks-title, tasks-filter-{all|interaction|observation|care}, tasks-pending-count, task-card-/task-body-/task-check-/task-backfill-/task-delete-{id}, tasks-completed-toggle, tasks-clear-completed, checkin-sheet, checkin-rating-{bad|ok|great}, checkin-skip, checkin-encouragement, confirm-dialog, confirm-ok, confirm-cancel, task-detail-back/title/info/export/checkin, toast) match implementation exactly. If future iterations regress tasks UI: register a FRESH e2e_<ts>@x.com, complete onboarding, GO to /tasks — the clean 6-card baseline (绘本3/7 recurring, 新词 one-time, 辅食 care overdue, 独处 selfcare, 户外5/7 favorited recurring, 指物1/3 recurring COMPLETED) will show. Backend contract locked in /app/backend/tests/test_iter5_tasks.py.

spec_verification_details.header: chevron-back + '我的任务' present ✓; back navigates to '/' (home tab, feed screen renders) ✓
spec_verification_details.filters: 4 chips exactly (全部/亲子互动/发展观察/照顾陪伴), NO selfcare chip ✓; 亲子互动 filter → 13/13 cards start with '亲子：' ✓; 全部 resets to full list ✓
spec_verification_details.date_row: '07 / 11' MM / DD format ✓, '今日' + '您有27项任务待办' with tasks-pending-count testID ✓
spec_verification_details.task_card_pending: type prefix (亲子/观察/照顾/自我) + title ✓; frequency small text ('每天一次，共7天') ✓; purple progress bar ✓; right-aligned 截止：M月D号 ✓; trash icon + 立刻打卡 light-purple button row ✓
spec_verification_details.task_card_overdue: '照顾：准备明天的辅食食材' pink bg (#FFF0EF) ✓; red left border ✓; '已过期' red bold text ✓; trash icon + '补全打卡' red-outline button ✓
spec_verification_details.selfcare_under_all: '自我：今天给自己留30分钟独处时间' visible under 全部 with 自我 prefix ✓
spec_verification_details.checkin_sheet: encouragement per type (interaction → '你陪伴的每一分钟，宝宝都记得') ✓; subtitle '记录这次任务体验' ✓ (visible in DOM under encourage); 3 emojis with labels: 😣 有待改进 / 😐 还不错 / 😊 非常棒！ ✓; 跳过 top-right closes sheet with NO toast ✓; emoji tap → highlight → auto-close ~0.5s → toast '已记录你的感受 ✓' ✓
spec_verification_details.archive: one-time task (独处) after checkin+rate → fades and joins '已完成（N）' section (N incremented from 2 to 3 then further to 9 across tests) ✓; expanded shows simplified light-purple strikethrough card ✓
spec_verification_details.recurring_checkin: recurring 户外 5/7 clicked → API +1 → 6/7 (stays pending, verified); second click → 7/7 → completed → archives ✓
spec_verification_details.delete_dialog:
exact text '删除这个任务？
删除后无法恢复
取消
删除' ✓; cancel keeps card ✓; 删除 confirm removes card ✓
spec_verification_details.clear_dialog:
exact text '清空已完成任务？
已收藏的任务不会被清除
取消
清空' ✓
spec_verification_details.backfill: 补全打卡 tap → toast '已补全打卡' ✓; overdue card moves to 已完成 section ✓
spec_verification_details.detail_page: back chevron + '任务卡' title ✓; big task title + purple pill (发展观察) ✓; 3-column info row (开始日期 07 / 11 / 结束日期 07 / 13 / 任务频率 一次性) ✓; 当前进度 bar + N/total (0/1 shown) ✓; 任务介绍 + 指引 numbered list rendered ✓; bottom export icon → toast '图片已保存到相册' ✓; 打卡完成 purple button present ✓; back → returns to /tasks ✓
spec_verification_details.console_errors: 0 console errors, 0 page errors during entire session ✓
spec_verification_details.regression: 首页 (feed) renders with green theme untouched ✓; tabs bar present (首页/对话/任务/我的) ✓

rca_of_issue: N/A — no failures encountered. Only observation: the test account has 27 tasks instead of promised 6, indicating a possible duplicate-seed issue on the shared account (see critical_code_review_comments).
